Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if these are used by the[n]art club during after-school hours...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}These are what we use[n]to paint during art club...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The painting supplies remind me[n]of my days spent in the art club...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if Hiraga is studying hard[n]to become a doctor right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if these are[n]used for art classes...[n]{f 1 1}
